name: analytics
description: Instructor+ per-course analytics: per-lesson completion counts, badge count, member count, quiz attempt/pass stats per module. Read-only derived aggregates over shared tables (no new tables, no writes); bounded takes documented in constants.ts; no PII in outputs.
notes: 0.1.0 (2026-07-10, agent gamma): wave v1.2 scope of STATUS row #17. Owns ZERO tables — reads the shared memberships/lessons/modules/lessonCompletions/courseCompletions/quizzes/quizAttempts tables directly (sanctioned precedent: progress/profiles shared-table reads). courseCompletions has no by_course index, so badge counts derive per CURRENT member via by_user (exact, bounded; ex-members' badges uncounted) — by_course index proposed to alpha. toPercent consumed via the progress BARREL (extract-on-second-occurrence: util shared by two slices; shared/ is integrator-only surface).
